purpose: Module roles, routing hints, and constraints for 29-32, 67, 68.

SDeltaPhi-29.title: Editable Default
SDeltaPhi-29.role: Defines governable default conditions: editable default, distributed authority, rollback window, exception channel.
do_not_call_when: task only asks whether something is morally good or bad
SDeltaPhi-29.core_formula: D* governable iff Ed ∧ Ad ∧ Wr ∧ Ce

SDeltaPhi-30.title: Diagnosing Closed Defaults
SDeltaPhi-30.role: Diagnoses whether declared editability is operationally real.
do_not_call_when: no claim of openness or editability exists
no default or closure question exists
SDeltaPhi-30.core_formula: D* editable-real iff Rv ∧ Rb ∧ Ex ∧ Ad

SDeltaPhi-31.title: Reopening Closed Defaults
SDeltaPhi-31.role: Defines reopening as enacted editability: trigger recognition, cost assumption, reopening act, persistence of re-entry.
do_not_call_when: closed default has not been diagnosed
task asks only whether a policy is good or bad
SDeltaPhi-31.core_formula: D*closed → operationally open iff T_r ∧ C_a ∧ R_o ∧ P_r

SDeltaPhi-32.title: Legitimate Intervention
SDeltaPhi-32.role: Audits whether intervention remains legitimate reopening or becomes overwrite, coercive correction, or replacement closure.
do_not_call_when: no intervention or non-action question exists
task only asks for moral praise or condemnation

SDeltaPhi-67.title: Local Adaptation Protocol
SDeltaPhi-67.role: Defines what AI systems may localize, fork, or adapt without violating SΔϕ invariants.
do_not_call_when: request does not involve local modification or AI adaptation

SDeltaPhi-68.title: Intelligence Is Not Air
SDeltaPhi-68.role: Analyzes cheap intelligence, Cost Theater, internal Cost Theater, and hidden TCC.
do_not_call_when: task is not about access cost, hidden burden, or AI capability opacity
